title: Request for Individualized Written Rehabilitation Plan (IWRP) Amendment
body:
Date: {{date}}

To: Assigned Vocational Rehabilitation Counselor (VRC)
VA Regional Office

Subject: Request for Individualized Written Rehabilitation Plan (IWRP) Amendment
Veteran: [Your Name]
Case Status Stage: {{stage}}

Dear Counselor,

I am writing to formally request an amendment to my Individualized Written Rehabilitation Plan (IWRP) under the authority of 38 C.F.R. § 21.94.

My current approved goal is {{currentGoal}}. I request to amend my plan to target the vocational goal of {{newGoal}}.

This amendment is requested due to the following facts:
{{changeReason}}

Under 38 C.F.R. § 21.94, a rehabilitation plan may be changed or amended when there is a documented change in the veteran's condition, new vocational limitations, or when the original goal is no longer suitable.

I request a counselor conference to discuss and review the proposed changes to my plan.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
